quality_highlights: pr-sous-chef.md: clean professional messages (🍳/✅/⚠️) with {status} variable; no theatrical language
playwright.md: exemplary structure — CLI recommended front-and-center, MCP deprecated with migration guidance, comprehensive real-world examples
mcp_http_url_validation_test.go: clean table-driven integration tests with descriptive test names

single_file_improvements.issue: Visual regression example uses version: "v1.52.0" for mode: cli, but config table documents CLI mode as pinning @playwright/cli npm package (default: 0.1.13). The v1.52.0 format is a Playwright browser Docker image version (MCP mode), not an npm package version. Change to "0.1.13" to align with the documented format.
run-failure message is theatrical and non-actionable ('The document remains unsummarized...'). Recurring pending task since 2026-06-01. Replace with actionable message directing users to run logs.
